в—Џ Done. Refactored CreateDialog.jsx to use Primer's Dialog from
  @primer/react/experimental вЂ” its built-in body region scrolls while the title and
  close button stay fixed. Also added a hideHeader prop to ArtifactForm to avoid
  duplicating the title shown by the Dialog.
